question_stem: GENCOST03 — How do you engineer prompts to optimize cost? (question verified 2026-06-05)
verbatim_text: GENCOST03-BP02 — Control model response length. Reduce output-token cost by bounding response length: set max_tokens (max completion length — the model stops once it produces that many tokens), use stop sequences (text patterns after which the model halts generating), and instruct the model in the prompt to be concise (e.g. 'limit your answer to three sentences'). Output tokens are typically the more expensive half of the per-call bill and are unbounded by default. NOTE: the live BP page's numbered implementation steps could not be fetched this session (docs.aws.amazon.com timed out repeatedly); this verbatim is reconstructed from search extraction + the BP's established scope. BP title and the GENCOST03 question stem are confirmed; step decomposition pending a verification pass (mapping_state unverified).
